basics.headline: OT Cyber Security Engineer | ICS / IEC 62443 | Industrial Risk & Compliance
workAuthorization: Eligible to work in the UK

summary: OT Cyber Security Engineer with 6+ years’ experience across industrial control systems (ICS), OT cybersecurity, and critical infrastructure including power generation, pharmaceuticals, cement, and manufacturing. Proven track record delivering IEC 62443-aligned OT risk assessments, asset inventories, network architecture reviews, and vulnerability remediation across multi-site environments. Adept at translating OT cyber risk into actionable controls for engineers, management, and external stakeholders, with strong problem-solving and communication skills.

core: OT Asset Inventory & Network Architecture Mapping
Industrial Protocol Awareness (Modbus, OPC, Profinet – conceptual)

experience.role: Engineer, OT Cyber Security & Assessment Systems
highlights: Conducted OT cybersecurity risk assessments aligned to IEC 62443, identifying vulnerabilities across PLCs, HMIs, switches, workstations, and OT networks, contributing to overall risk reduction.
Delivered OT asset inventories, network topology diagrams, and architecture documentation to support security assurance and modernization initiatives, ensuring project delivery.
Reviewed and validated SCADA, DCS, and OT workstation configurations to ensure secure connectivity and compliance with cybersecurity requirements, providing guidance on secure ICS designs.
Coordinated on-site OT cybersecurity assessments with plant engineers, offshore teams, and client stakeholders, minimizing production downtime and ensuring site audit integrity.
Produced structured OT cyber risk reports, findings, and remediation recommendations for client and internal governance, supporting proposal development.
Supported OT cybersecurity improvement initiatives aligned with industrial modernization and resilience objectives, leveraging expertise in security technologies.
Led OT cybersecurity and control system initiatives across 20+ power generation projects, supporting secure operation of ~7,208 MW of assets and ensuring project delivery.
Delivered OT cyber risk reduction measures for power stations, improving resilience of control systems and plant networks through vulnerability management.
Applied corporate cybersecurity and OT security standards to ensure regulatory and internal compliance across operational sites, including ISO 27001 adherence.
Collaborated with operations, maintenance, and contractors to ensure secure system integration, commissioning, and handover, demonstrating strong communication skills.
Supported technical tendering and procurement with cybersecurity justifications for OT investments, contributing to proposal development.
dataQualityNotes: The date range appears reversed in the source (Aug 2023 - Oct 2021). Verify and correct.

highlights: Delivered ICS and OT system integration projects across multiple client sites, including PLC, SCADA, and industrial networks, ensuring successful project delivery.
Designed OT system architectures, network diagrams, and control documentation aligned with cybersecurity best practices and industry standards.
Supported secure system configuration, SAT/FAT testing, and commissioning activities, contributing to solution design.
Promoted OT security and reliability best practices during project execution and client engagement, providing guidance on secure operational technology.
Maintained and upgraded Honeywell Experion PKS DCS with ~22,000 I/O points in a live industrial environment, ensuring system reliability.
Troubleshot OT and I&C issues in coordination with operations teams to maintain production continuity, demonstrating problem-solving skills.
Designed and implemented control logic and system enhancements to reduce operational risk and improve reliability.
Gained hands-on operational OT experience, strengthening understanding of real-world safety, availability, and cyber risk trade-offs.

recruiterNotes: Eligible to work in the UK
